title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: Local knowledge base for documents and code. Index PDFs (including scanned via vision OCR), Office docs, spreadsheets, images, and code — search or ask questions standalone, or plug into AI agents via MCP. Fully local with Ollama + LanceDB + tree-sitter.

title: wink-wink-wink555/WordNest
summary: WordNest🎯 是一个基于Flask的现代化个性化英语单词学习系统，专为解决传统背单词软件的痛点而设计。它通过仅收录用户手动添加的生词，告别海量词库的无效重复学习；调用大模型实现AI智能例句生成与记忆技巧辅助，并构建词汇知识图谱，以可视化关联提升记忆效率。
